\newpage
\stopEndfloat
\newrefsection
\setcounter{linenumber}{1}
\setcounter{section}{0}
\renewcommand{\thefigure}{S1.\arabic{figure}}
\setcounter{figure}{0}
\renewcommand{\thetable}{S1.\arabic{table}}
\setcounter{table}{0}

\refstepcounter{appendix}\label{appendix1}
\begin{center}
\Large \textbf{Appendix 1 for:}
\end{center}

\titleblock
\large

\newpage
\blandscape

# Some title

# References

\printbibliography[heading=none]
